Anti-Lock Braking System, Anti-Theft Alarm, ESC - Electronic Stabilisation Control inc ABS - ASR and EDL, Electromechanical Parking Brake, First Aid Kit and Warning Triangle, ISOFIX Child Seat Mounting and Top Tether, Multi Collision Brake Assist, Parking System Plus, Pop-Up Bonnet for Pedestrian Protection, Pre-Sense City, Seat Belt Monitoring, Variable Restraint System
Car.MetaTag: Audi A5 2.0 TFSI S line S Tronic Euro 6 (s/s) 2dr Petrol Automatic Black
Car.Description: - Stunning Automatic Audi A5 S line finished in sleek black, combining sharp coupe styling with everyday practicality. This 68-plate example offers the perfect balance of performance, comfort and premium build quality. - Powered by the responsive 2.0 TFSI petrol engine, it delivers smooth acceleration and confident motorway cruising while remaining economical for its class. The S line specification adds sporty styling and upgraded suspension for a more dynamic drive. - 🔥 Key Features: - S line exterior styling and badging - LED headlights and rear lights - 20” S line diamond cut alloy wheels - Sport suspension - Half leather / Alcantara S line sports seats - Multifunction steering wheel - Audi MMI infotainment system - Heated seats. - Bluetooth connectivity - Cruise control - Dual-zone climate control - Front and rear parking sensors - The cabin is refined and driver-focused, with high-quality materials throughout and excellent comfort for both driver and passengers. The boot offers generous space, making this car as practical as it is stylish. - ✅ 74,000 miles - ✅ Mot will be renewed. - ✅ Drives superbly - This A5 S line is ideal for anyone looking for a premium, sporty coupe with strong road presence and everyday usability.

Car.Name: Audi
Car.FullModel: 2.0 TDI S line Plus S Tronic quattro Euro 5 (s/s) 5dr
Car.Description: - Available now is this stunning and well-maintained 2014 Audi Q3 2.0 TDI S line Plus S tronic quattro, a premium compact SUV offering strong performance, luxury comfort, and excellent all-weather capability. - Powered by the 2.0 TDI diesel engine paired with the smooth S tronic automatic gearbox and quattro four-wheel drive, it delivers confident handling, impressive fuel economy, and the refined driving experience Audi is known for. - ✅ S line Plus • S tronic Auto • quattro 4WD - Key Features Include: - • S line Plus styling and interior - • S tronic automatic transmission - • quattro four-wheel drive - • Half-leather / Alcantara S line sport seats - • Satellite navigation system - • Bluetooth and media connectivity - • Dual-zone climate control - • Cruise control - • Xenon headlights with LED daytime running lights - • Front and rear parking sensors - • Multifunction steering wheel - • Alloy wheels - • Electric windows and mirrors - • ISOFIX - Drives superb — smooth, powerful, and extremely refined. No warning lights or mechanical issues. - • Recently serviced and inspected - • MOT expires October 2026 - ✅ Drive away today – reserve NA14 VNF with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). - 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. - ⸻ - Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? - We provide: - • Full mechanical inspection - • Free comprehensive warranty - • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) - • Fresh valet inside and out - • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service - 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Audi Q3 S line Plus quattro Auto
